name_cn:
【Paris Grey ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
